text.message: I’m building to 10 I’m not quite as scary as I look
Blue can be on 7 or 6 with a mono
Black gets road for 6 maybe it’s time to not be the solo
You are the clear solo the entire game
It’s cuz I’m not the only threat
The game is close bc of us slowing u down
Fair what I deserve for pacing
Nah u have road and down dev its you now
anyone want anything before I port?
Those solos see a bit harsh
U would have won if we didnt do that lol
Maybe I can go for road
I dont want to do it
I got pounded all game makes no difference now
Every spot was rly bad sorry
I didn’t complain about the solos till like the 4th one also
lol if this is a vp that’s funny
And yet you still get to nine this  game
Nah I don’t get road that was my one chance
So all those hits and you had a pull for the win
There was no denying he was the solo for a good while
Not sure why you hit me if your taking road lol
Why did u trade him on 9
I didn’t think he had the win
I didn’t lol just clearing my hand
